channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Ontario’s Nuclear Expansion: Funding the $400 Billion Plan
item.description: Ontario's nuclear expansion plans, proposed by Premier Doug Ford, include the construction of new nuclear power plants and refurbishments of existing reactors. The estimated capital cost exceeds $400 ...

item.title: DHS Moves Toward Consolidating Biometric Data Across Agencies
item.description: The Department of Homeland Security (DHS) is planning to consolidate its biometric technologies into a unified platform that would allow multiple agencies to search through large databases of faces, f...

item.title: Only Three NHS Trusts Met 85% Cancer Treatment Target in 2025, Data Shows Wide Regional Gaps
item.description: New analysis of NHS England data for 2025 shows that the vast majority of NHS acute trusts in England are failing to meet the national cancer treatment target, with significant variation in performanc...

item.title: Amanda Platell Responds to Hurtful Comments on Her Column About Prince William
item.description: Amanda Platell, a Daily Mail columnist, reflects on the hurtful online comments she received after writing a piece about Prince William and the monarchy. In her column, Platell had criticised William ...

item.title: Russian Shadow Fleet Oil Tankers Continue to Transit the English Channel Despite Sanctions
item.description: A Sky News investigation reports that dozens of tankers linked to Russia’s so-called “shadow fleet” are regularly transiting the English Channel, carrying millions of barrels of oil that help finance ...

item.title: Paramount Skydance Submits Final $31-Per-Share Bid for Warner Bros Discovery Amid Competing Netflix Offer
item.description: Paramount Skydance has submitted a revised “best and final” offer to acquire Warner Bros Discovery (WBD), intensifying a high-stakes takeover battle with Netflix. The new proposal values WBD shares at...

item.title: Election Monitors Ordered to Show 'Sensitivity' Amid Family Voting Allegations
item.description: Election monitors observing the Gorton and Denton by-election in Greater Manchester were instructed to approach any suspicions of illegal 'family voting' with 'sensitivity' towards cultural practices,...

item.title: UK MPs Critique Prince Andrew but Show Limited Appetite for Monarchy Reform
item.description: In a recent debate in the UK House of Commons, MPs expressed unusually blunt criticism of Prince Andrew, calling him 'rude, arrogant, and entitled,' reflecting the near-total collapse of respect for h...

item.title: India Blocks Access to Developer Platform Supabase Amid Unclear Restrictions
item.description: Supabase, a popular developer database platform, has been facing significant disruptions in India after a blocking order was issued on February 24, 2026. This move, directed by the Indian government u...

item.title: Microbe Defies Key Rule in Genetic Code, Offering New Insights into Protein Production
item.description: Researchers from the University of California, Berkeley, have discovered a microbe that challenges a key rule of the genetic code. Methanosarcina acetivorans, a methane-producing archaeon, interprets ...

item.title: Key Highlights and Political Tensions in Trump’s 2026 State of the Union Address
item.description: President Donald Trump delivered his 2026 State of the Union address in what became the longest speech of its kind, presenting a forceful defense of his administration’s policies while confronting a s...

item.title: Trump targets Iran's leaders with missile strikes amid heightened tensions over nuclear threat
item.description: Donald Trump has condemned Iran's leadership for a prolonged history of violence, including its support for terrorism and military actions against the United States and its allies. Following weeks of ...

item.title: Welsh Parliament Approves Consent for Assisted Dying Legislation
item.description: The Senedd in Wales has approved a legislative consent motion that allows the implementation of assisted dying services within the NHS, pending final approval from Westminster. The vote followed a hig...

item.title: Japan Sets 2030 Timeline for Surface-to-Air Missile Deployment on Yonaguni Island Amid China Tensions
item.description: Japan has announced plans to deploy medium-range surface-to-air missiles on its westernmost island, Yonaguni, by fiscal year 2030, which ends in March 2031. Defence Minister Shinjiro Koizumi confirmed...

item.title: How Families Are Sharing Costs as Adult Children Return Home Amid Rising Rents
item.description: As high rents continue to strain the finances of young adults, many are returning to the family home, prompting a new dynamic in family finances. Tricia Carter, a 63-year-old living in south London, c...

item.title: Drone Warfare Intensifies in Sudan’s Kordofan Region as Civilian Toll Mounts
item.description: Sudan’s civil war has entered a new and deadly phase as intensified drone attacks reshape the battlefield in the south-central Kordofan region. Nearly three years after fighting erupted in April 2023 ...

item.title: Airlines Suspend Flights in the Middle East Amid Rising Tensions
item.description: Several major international airlines, including Air France, British Airways, Lufthansa, and KLM, have begun canceling flights to and from key Middle Eastern countries, including Israel, Saudi Arabia, ...

item.title: Epstein Survivors Demand Accountability, Reject Claims of Trump's Exoneration
item.description: The ongoing investigations into the Epstein affair have sparked heated debates, particularly regarding the involvement of high-profile figures like Donald Trump. Republican Representatives Nancy Mace ...

item.title: O2 Becomes First UK Network to Offer Starlink Satellite Access for Rural Customers
item.description: O2 has become the first mobile network in the UK to enable satellite connectivity for its users, using Elon Musk's Starlink technology. This new service will automatically connect customers to Starlin...

item.title: Merz Visits China Amid Growing Concerns Over Germany’s Expanding Trade Deficit
item.description: German Chancellor Friedrich Merz has arrived in Beijing for his first official visit to China, accompanied by a significant business delegation, as Germany faces mounting concerns over a widening trad...
